prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约14006→14487→17410→19311（2024年出现异常断档92297，系专业组504所致，正常专业组最低14696），整体呈后移趋势，近4 年累计后移约5300名；2025年基准约19311名；本省物理类计划2021年78人、2022年80人、2023年80人、2024年87人、2025年99人，逐年递增；2026年计 划108人，较2025年扩招约9.1%，招生规模持续扩大，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第55名，近年排名稳定在49–55名区间，学校综合实 力稳中有升；2023年曾因图书馆表白墙事件引发中性舆情，近年无重大负面或正面事件；抖音热度排名第102位（评价一般），短视频平台曝光度不高，报考关 注度平稳；第五轮学科评估作物学A+、植物保护A+、食品科学与工程A、兽医学A-、畜牧学A-，共5个A-及以上学科，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业考生有稳定吸引 力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 农林类整体社会热度平稳，动物医学、食品科学与工程等专业有稳定需求；本省2026年物理类考生估算约26.9万人，较2025年增加约3.3%，竞争基数 扩大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划扩招约9.1%以及本省物理类考生增 加约3.3%三方面因素，扩招幅度大于考生增幅，净效应为竞争略趋缓，但位次后移惯性及2024年断档后的恢复性反弹已基本完成，2025年位次已回归正常区间。预计2026年最低位 次约20564名，区间20064–21064名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 14006 → 14487 → 17410 → 19311 (in 2024, an abnormal break occurred at 92297 due to major group 504; the normal major group minimum was 14696), showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5300 positions over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 19311; the provincial physics category enrollment plan was 78 in 2021, 80 in 2022, 80 in 2023, 87 in 2024, and 99 in 2025, increasing year by year; the 2026 plan is 108, an expansion of about 9.1% compared to 2025, with enrollment scale continuing to expand, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is approximately 55th, with rankings stable in the 49–55 range in recent years, showing steady improvement in overall strength; in 2023, there was a neutral public opinion incident related to the library confession wall, with no major negative or positive events in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking is 102nd (average evaluation), with low exposure on short video platforms, and stable application attention; the fifth round of discipline evaluation includes Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A-, and Animal Science A-, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, providing stable appeal for related major applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of agriculture and forestry is stable, with stable demand for majors such as Veterinary Medicine and Food Science and Engineering; the estimated number of physics category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 269,000, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025, expanding the competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the planned enrollment expansion of about 9.1% in 2026, and the increase of about 3.3% in provincial physics category examinees, the expansion rate exceeds the examinee growth rate, with the net effect being a slight easing of competition. However, the inertia of the backward shift and the recovery rebound after the 2024 break have largely been completed, with the 2025 ranking returning to a normal range. The minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to be approximately 20564, with a range of 20064–21064.

Rankings better than the lower limit (within 20064) can focus on popular majors such as Electronic Information, Accounting, and Veterinary Medicine; rankings near the upper limit (around 21064) should prioritize Tier 2 majors like Food Science and Engineering and Statistics, while using Tier 3 majors as stable backups.
